strengths: 18+ years of hands-on fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB matching the primary stack
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work directly satisfies the AI agent development requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tools authorship, and open-source leadership
concerns: No stated Nest.js experience, and Vitest/Playwright are not explicitly mentioned despite deep testing background
Kotlin and Python are absent from the skills list; Java exposure appears dated and secondary
Education timeline overlaps with concurrent full-time roles in other countries, which may warrant verification
response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years experience bar with sustained senior fullstack work in the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes), plus rare and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience. Craftsmanship signals (TDD, testing libraries, workshops, code reviews culture) align with the role's quality expectations. Gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js, Kotlin, Python) and readily learnable given the demonstrated polyglot history; the education timeline overlap is a minor diligence item rather than a disqualifier.
